globalStylePrompt: cute kawaii kitten illustration, soft children-book rendering, centered composition, full body sitting pose, clean pale background, consistent proportions, polished fur details, bright eyes, sticker-friendly silhouette
globalConstraintPrompt: keep the same cat identity, same pose, same camera angle, same tail position, same body proportions, same fur pattern, same eye color, same background style
negativePrompt: extra limbs, extra tail, cropped ears, missing paws, duplicated whiskers, distorted anatomy, open mouth unless specified, dramatic background, accessories, collar, text, watermark, logo, photorealistic, lowres, blurry, oversaturated, deformed face
